title: arctium macrolepis
intro: Arctium macrolepis, also known as large-leaved burdock, is a biennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Arctium macrolepis include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea. Herbal preparations of Arctium macrolepis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
